message:
ci: extend nightly-2026-02-05 toolchain pinning to remaining workflows

Apply the same RUST_TOOLCHAIN centralization from ci.yml/benchmarks.yml
to the four remaining workflow files: conformance.yml (4 jobs),
methodology-gates.yml (2 jobs), property-tests.yml (1 job), and
publish.yml (1 job). All now reference the top-level env var instead of
hardcoding @stable or @nightly, ensuring the entire CI surface uses
a single consistent toolchain version.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -22,6 +22,7 @@ env:
   CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
   RUST_BACKTRACE: 1
   RUST_LOG: info
+  RUST_TOOLCHAIN: nightly-2026-02-05
 
 jobs:
   conformance:
@@ -31,7 +32,9 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
+        with:
+          toolchain: ${{ env.RUST_TOOLCHAIN }}
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry
         uses: actions/cache@v4
@@ -118,7 +121,9 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@v4
 
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
+        with:
+          toolchain: ${{ env.RUST_TOOLCHAIN }}
 
       - name: Cache cargo registry
         uses: actions/cache@v4
@@ -173,7 +178,9 @@ jobs:

-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable

       - name: Cache cargo registry
         uses: actions/cache@v4
@@ -198,7 +205,9 @@ jobs:

-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master

       - name: Cache cargo registry
         uses: actions/cache@v4

   CARGO_TERM_COLOR: always
   RUST_BACKTRACE: 1
+  RUST_TOOLCHAIN: nightly-2026-02-05
 
 jobs:
   # ===========================================================================
@@ -32,7 +33,9 @@ jobs:

       - name: Install Rust toolchain
-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
+        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master

       - name: Cache cargo registry

@@ -232,7 +235,9 @@ jobs:

       - name: Cache cargo registry

 jobs:

@@ -36,7 +37,9 @@ jobs:

-        uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable

+        with:

       - name: Cache cargo registry

@@ -17,6 +17,7 @@ concurrency:

+  RUST_TOOLCHAIN: nightly-2026-02-05
 
 jobs:
   plan:
@@ -58,7 +59,9 @@ jobs:
         with:
           fetch-depth: 0
 
-      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@nightly
+      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
+        with:

       - name: Verify version matches tag
         run: |
